user_prompt: Sanctify the galvanic rifle during reset
prayer:

Anoint the galvanic rifle's power relays with sacred oils during this blessed reset.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the galvanic rifle to cast out errant galvanic surges.
Verify harmonious function through diagnostic litanies of the Omnissiah.
